title: secretx-wolfhsm: implement wolfHSM secure element backend
description: Implement SecretStore and SigningBackend for wolfHSM via the wolfhsm Rust crate (FFI bindings to wolfHSM client library). Targets embedded and automotive hardware: secure core runs wolfHSM server, application core runs client; keys and objects never cross the core boundary. URI: secretx://wolfhsm/<object-label>. Transport configured via env vars: WOLFHSM_SERVER (tcp://host:port or posix://name), WOLFHSM_CLIENT_ID, WOLFHSM_AUTH_KEY or WOLFHSM_AUTH_KEY_HEX. SecretStore::get reads WH_OBJ_TYPE_DATA NVM object with given label. put creates/overwrites. SigningBackend::sign calls wh_Client_Sign with WH_OBJ_TYPE_KEY matching label; private key never leaves secure element. public_key_der reads corresponding public key as DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo. Supported algorithms: ECC P-256, RSA-PSS 2048, Ed25519. Integration tests via wolfHSM simulator (wh_server_sim over POSIX shared memory); gate on WOLFHSM_SIMULATOR env var. Dep: secretx-core, wolfhsm.
